notes.en: This build focuses primarily on [[character:xinyan]]'s [[stat:physical-damage]] as an On-Field DPS. At **[C2]**, [[character:xinyan]] can build a 1:3 [[stat:cr]] : [[stat:cd]] ratio instead of the usual 1:2 [[stat:cr]] : [[stat:cd]] ratio.
notes.fr: Cette build se concentre principalement sur les [[stat:physical-damage]] de [[character:xinyan]] en tant que DPS On-Field. Une fois **[C2]**, [[character:xinyan]] peut se build avec un ratio [[stat:cr]] : [[stat:cd]] 1:3 au lieu du ratio 1:2 habituel.
notes.it: Questa build si concentra principalmete sui DAN Fisici di [[character:xinyan]] come DPS sul campo. A **[C2]**, puoi mirare ad una proporzione 1:3 di [[stat:cr]] : [[stat:cd]], al posto della consueta 1:2.
